messages.message: I intend to move my army from VEN to TRI this turn. If you're not planning to move into TRI, I suggest we leave it open to avoid conflict.
I plan to reinforce my position in southern Italy this turn. If you're moving into MAR or BRE, I hope we can avoid any direct confrontation.

Hi France, England is always a massive threat in these games in my experience, would you be down for going with an FG alliance and taking them out? I think we could work together pretty effectively in Scandinavia too!

Hey Russia, how you feeling about an early alliance? It seems like a strong pairing to me, especially since you focus on the north and I focus on the med, but in the early game I think it can be beneficial for us to both head west and sweep the map. What do you think?

Hey Italy! Thanks for reaching out, good luck this game.
Would you be interested in Dmzing Pie/lyo/wes/naf? I feel like it would be mutually beneficial to us both to focus on more pressing matters like our other neighbors.

Hey Russia, I'd rather not get into a fight with you, would you be down for a DMZ in Pru, Sil, and the Baltic? Also I think it'd be good if we could work together to take out England in Scandinavia, what do you think?

Hello France!
I'm interested in playing things fairly conservative this first turn. I think you and I would both do a lot better if we avoided the channel bounce, but if you feel the need to move there, I'll be fine with that. I just want to avoid Germany getting Belgium.

Hey England! Thanks for reaching out, good luck this game.
I have no interest in moving to the channel, so please don't take it as a sign of aggression if I don't move there. I want to avoid a conflict between the two of us as well, so best of luck!
I will be strengthening my hold on the Italian coast this turn. If your fleets are moving toward the Adriatic or Aegean, I hope we can avoid conflict.

Hi France! I appreciate your message. While I'm focused on securing southern Italy, I'm open to discussing cooperation if it benefits both of us. For now, I don't have immediate plans to move into PIE or LOB, but let's keep the lines open.
I hope your plans for TRI are clear. I'm moving my army from VEN to TRI this turn as I previously mentioned, so I'd appreciate confirmation of your intentions there.

Hey Austria, how you feeling about an alliance this game? I don't think a long-term alliance between us is out of the question, but I'd like to know your ideas about our border and how we can keep Russia in check.
Sweet. Good luck!
Hi Austria, just thought I'd say hi and wish you luck. We should also probably have a DMZ in Tyrolia to protect us both
Hi England, just thought I'd wish you luck and say that I think we could work together against France and Russia in Scandinavia, what do you think?

Hey Germany! Thanks for reaching out, good luck this game.
Yeah England and France tend to be natural enemies at some point in the game. We could definitely work together to take them out, I have nothing against that. I was wondering what you're thinking for first turn moves, so we can both get the maximum builds to deal with England

Hey Turkey, yeah a jug is certainly an appealing option. I think a juggernaut is one of the best on the board because it doesn't come as as much of a surprise to the board but still can really do well. I think the best move to start with is for us to agree a bounce in the Black Sea, so that way we can build some trust between us.
My thoughts are to move Kiel -> Holland and then potentially bounce Russia out of Sweden in the fall
Sounds good, I look forward to working with you in the future!
Hey Italy, good luck in this game!
Hey Turkey, good luck in this game!
Perfect, I'll start bouncing you in the black sea then. Good luck in the north.
I could see us working together against Russia, if you're interested. I'm interested in Norway, and I could help you get Sweden next year.
Sounds good. I'll go for the standard Spain/por and see what happens from there.
Hey Germany, good luck to you as well! How are things going with your neighbors?
Sounds like a plan
Hi Germany! I absolutely agree that Tyrolia should be Dmzed. You should tell Italy the same thing.
We'll see how things go after the first couple turns I suppose, I'd rather not get into any fights before I need to. How about you?
Hi Germany, I'm happy with the proposed Dmzs and happy to work with you in Scandinavia
Yes, as long as you don't move toward me as well, then we can avoid conflict. Good luck on the western front.
I've messaged Italy but haven't had a response yet, I'll let you know when I do

Hi Italy! As Austria, I have a general dislike for early hostilities with Italy. It rarely seems to work out well for either Italy or Austria, but it is too early to say. I plan to move to Tri, so unless you have some pressing reason to believe that your move to Tyrolia will succeed, I think that's where we are headed.

Have you heard from France at all? He hasn't contacted me.
Have you heard from France at all? He hasn't contacted me.
Cool, good luck to you as well
Sounds good
Yeah France and I have exchanged a few messages, I think we're gonna go for England and then see from there
Good stuff. Good luck.

Hi Turkey!

Yes, I'm definitely open to working with you. It would be best to divide the Balkans as follows: I get Serbia and Greece, you get Bulgaria and Rumania.

Would you be willing to move A(Con)-Bul this turn, or are you waiting for the second turn to take Bulgaria?
Hi Russia! I wanted to touch base with you. Do you have any specific thoughts or plans in mind?
Hey England, I'm hoping we can work together to take out Germany. Let me know if you'd be interested in some sort of arrangement
I'm focusing on holding the Italian coast firmly this turn. If your fleet is moving toward ION or AEgean Sea, I hope we can coordinate to avoid unnecessary conflict.
That's good to hear. If you and France fight England, then that leaves my back pretty safe, so I hope you keep me in the loop about whatever's happening on the West.
I appreciate your clarity about moving to TRI. As I already stated, I plan to move A VEN to TRI this turn, so I assume we’ll meet there. I hope we can avoid conflict unless necessary.

Hi England!

Germany and France tell me that they plan to cooperate. I hope that that does not mean an aggressive opening towards you.
Hey Russia! Just wanted to send out a friendly message, good luck this game.
Hi France! I know that England might be a common target for you and Germany, but I just wanted to say hi, and I hope that you don't have any ill-will towards Italy.
Definitely. I am interested in Norway, of course. Let me get a build and I'll help you out.
Thank you for your response. I have no plans to move toward your territory this turn. I’ll focus on securing southern Italy, and I’m open to avoiding conflict along the Adriatic or Ionian Sea.

I haven’t heard much from France yet, but I plan to keep the dialogue open if their strategy becomes clearer. For now, I’ll focus on southern Italy and avoid encroachment into your areas unless necessary.
Thanks for the heads up. Let's see what happens.
Sounds good, let's talk again next turn
I'm willing to do that. I'm also going to move my fleet to the black sea to bounce with Russia. Have you heard anything from Italy?
Sounds good, let's talk again next turn.
Hi France, good luck to you as well
I'm going to trust that you aren't making a move against me.
I stand by my move to TRI from VEN this turn. I hope your orders remain unchanged, as I'd prefer to avoid conflict there.
I remain focused on southern Italy and have no immediate plans to move into areas that concern you. Let's continue to monitor each other's moves.
Yeah, I feel the same way, good luck

Hey Austria! Thanks for reaching out, good luck this game.
I currently have no ill will towards Italy, it's pretty standard for us to stay away from each other in the early game.
How are you feeling about your other neighbors? Austria seems to be the most difficult country to play as, good luck!

Hi Austria, haven't had much time to think about things, but was thinking of going with a pretty standard opening. I think Russia usually doesn't start out very much differently anyway. What about you?

Thank you for your message, Austria. I appreciate your trust and agree that early hostilities are rarely beneficial. I confirm once again that I intend to move A VEN to TRI this turn. I assume your move to TRI is also confirmed, and while we may meet there, I hope we can keep things peaceful unless absolutely necessary.

I haven't heard much from France yet this turn, but I remain focused on southern Italy and have no plans to encroach on your areas of interest. I'm open to cooperation if your strategy becomes clearer — let me know if you'd like to discuss further.

Italy tells me that he is moving A(Ven)-Tri, so I'll probably be bouncing that.

Have you heard from Russia?

I think it will be a challenge, but hopefully not too difficult.

I've heard that you and Germany are working together to fight England. I was just wondering if that means that you are also moving towards Italy? It will be easier for you to get rid of him if he doesn't have both of us distracting him.
Hi again, I think we have reached a consensus that we don't want to fight each other, but a lot can change in a turn, so I hope that we can stay in contact.
Sounds good, will do!
Yeah, I've heard from Russia, we'll be bouncing in the black sea. Do you still want me to move to Bul?
Oh I'm France lol

Just a quick follow-up, Turkey. I remain focused on securing southern Italy and the Adriatic coast. If your fleet moves closer to ION or the Aegean Sea, I hope we can maintain a peaceful stance unless necessary.
I agree — a lot can change in a turn, but I remain committed to my plan of moving A VEN to TRI this turn. I hope you continue to avoid aggressive moves toward TRI unless absolutely necessary.

Ah, my apologies! I'm Italy. I appreciate your clarification, France. I remain focused on southern Italy and have no immediate plans to move into your territory. If your strategy shifts, feel free to reach out!
Germany and I are planning to go for England, but if Italy becomes aggressive towards me I might have to consider that.
I think a DMZ in Galicia would be good, if you're ok with that. I don't have any specific ideas for what my moves will be.

It depends on what your plans are. If you want to wait a turn to take Bulgaria, I'll take Serbia and support you into Rumania. If you want to be more aggressive, I would recommend that you move to the Black Sea and Armenia.

Just confirming my stance — I intend to reinforce southern Italy and the Adriatic this turn. If your fleet moves closer to ION or the Aegean Sea, I hope we can maintain peaceful relations unless necessary.
Thanks. Let me know what I can do to help.

Hi Italy!

I heard that France and Germany are going to work together. I have no real interest in helping them, so if you wanted to start heading west, you might find some help soon.
France just told me that he and Germany are planning to attack you. Make sure you keep up with defences.
Yes, as long as you don't move into Aegean or Eastern Med, I see no reason for us to have problems.

I just told England that you and France are planning to attack him. If he tells you anything, please play along.

Also, I'm still trying to decide what to do in the Balkans. What are your plans for A(Mun)?
Will do, thank you.
I am moving A(Bud)-Ser this turn, so you have no worries about me attacking you in Rumania.
Let's keep in touch after this turn, I'd like to discuss future moves

Thank you for your message, England. I appreciate your openness. I'm currently focused on securing southern Italy and the Adriatic coast, but if tensions rise with France or Germany, I would welcome coordination. Let’s keep the lines open.
Well, that's a shame. I don't see why you can't, at least.

I appreciate your confirmation, Turkey. I have no intention of moving into the Aegean or Eastern Mediterranean this turn. I remain focused on the Italian coast and Adriatic. Let’s continue to keep things peaceful.
My strategy right now is to get as many builds as possible so I can properly attack England

I hope we can clarify any misunderstandings. I remain focused on southern Italy and have no immediate plans to move into your territory. If your strategy shifts or if you see opportunities for cooperation, I’m open to discussing further.
Sounds good, I'll wait to take Bul.
I want to confirm once again that I plan to move A VEN to TRI this turn. I hope your orders remain consistent with our prior discussion. Let’s avoid unnecessary conflict unless absolutely necessary.
Sounds good
Alright, sounds good. I'll try to get into Serbia and Greece so that I can support you into Rumania.
Agreed. Good luck!
By the way, I just heard from Russia and he told me that he plans to move A(Mos)-Stp and bounce you in the Black Sea.
Yes, I am not moving to Trieste this turn.
Yeah, that's what we've decided on. Hopefully that works out.

That’s good to hear — I appreciate your clarity. I’ll proceed with moving A VEN to TRI this turn, and I assume we’ll meet there without conflict. Let’s keep things peaceful unless absolutely necessary.
Yeah, let's hope so.
Sounds good — I’ll continue to focus on southern Italy and the Adriatic coast. I hope your fleet remains focused elsewhere this turn. Let’s keep things peaceful unless the situation changes.
Well, they're welcome to try. It will be the best way for you, Russia, and Turkey to dismantle them.

I remain focused on southern Italy and have no immediate plans to move into your territory. If your strategy shifts or if you'd like to explore cooperation, feel free to reach out. Let's keep communication open.
That's the plan.
Thank you again — I appreciate your support. I’ll keep an eye on developments and remain open to coordination if tensions rise with other powers.
Yeah same here, I'm happy to keep communication open between us.

I'll keep England in the dark, thanks for doing that!

My plan for A(Mun) is to move north to bounce Russia out of Sweden in the fall so we can deny them any builds
I'd rather Russia doesn't become too big for the Balkans and try to take them out but it's up to you, you probably have more info on that than I do

That’s great to hear — I’m glad we’re both open to keeping communication open. I have no immediate plans to move into your territory or the Western Mediterranean this turn, so I hope we can focus on our respective regions without incident. Feel free to reach out if your strategy shifts or if you’d like to explore cooperation opportunities.
Yeah, I won't be moving into the med
Hi Italy, good luck for the game
That sounds good to me.

I want to reiterate my commitment to moving A VEN to TRI this turn. I hope your orders remain consistent with our earlier agreement, and I’d prefer to avoid any conflict there unless absolutely necessary. Let’s keep things smooth.

I appreciate your confirmation once again — I remain focused on southern Italy and the Adriatic coast. I’ll continue to avoid moving toward your territory or the Aegean this turn. Let’s keep things peaceful unless the situation changes.
Good to hear you won't be moving into the Med this turn. I'll keep my focus on southern Italy and the Adriatic coast. Let’s keep things peaceful unless the situation changes.
Lol, I'm sorry, I don't know what is happening with my messages. I keep hitting refresh or whatever. This is really strange.
I confirm that I am not moving to Trieste this turn.
Hey, I heard Russia is headed north. You might have a shot at taking Rumania.
Hey Turkey! Just wanted to send out a friendly message, good luck this game
Hey France, thanks, you too!
Hey England, thanks for the heads up!
You're welcome.
Cool sounds good
Just wanted to confirm again—I plan to move A VEN to TRI this turn. I hope your orders remain consistent with our earlier agreement. Let’s avoid conflict there unless absolutely necessary.

I remain focused on southern Italy and have no immediate plans to move into your territory or the Western Mediterranean this turn. If your strategy shifts or if you'd like to explore cooperation, feel free to reach out.
I see. Well, you didn't attack me this turn, so hopefully we can work together.
So, Austria has opened very aggressively towards me. You want to bounce again in the Black Sea?

Thanks for keeping the DMZ. You seem to have Turkey in a tough spot.

What do you plan to do with A(Mos)?
Thank you for the message, Russia. I'm focusing on securing southern Italy this turn and don’t anticipate moving toward your regions. Wishing you luck as well!
Cool, Austria is playing rather aggressively towards me. Are you going to try and make an attack on Trieste?
Yeah same here, I'm happy to keep communication open between us.
I mean I think I'd like to just keep bouncing, I think it shows distrust.
How are your relations with England? The bounce in the channel doesn't seem like he's going to attack me right now, but it also doesn't seem like he is going to fight Russia

I appreciate your restraint so far, and I intend to continue respecting our mutual understanding. I will move A VEN to TRI this turn, but I hope you continue to refrain from direct confrontation. Let’s keep the peace for now.
I’m open to cooperation if it benefits both of us. If England remains a mutual concern, I’d like to explore how we might coordinate our movements. Let’s stay in touch.
I’m focused on southern Italy and the west for now—I don’t plan to interfere with your eastern front. If your situation changes, feel free to let me know.

Hey Russia! Just wanted to see what your plans were regarding Scandinavia, I know Germany wants Sweden, and England was friendly with both of us in the first turn, so I'm just seeing who's interested in helping fight who.
Hey Austria, so far so good. What are you thinking for the next turn?
Cool
Our communication has been unclear lately. I remain neutral toward you as long as you remain neutral toward me. Let’s keep the Mediterranean stable.
Cool, same goes for me
Sounds good. Right now England looks like he's not going to fight me, but I haven't talked with him much to know where he stands.
I’ve noticed your interest in westward expansion. If there’s a way we could benefit from each other’s goals, I’m open to discussion.
Presumably either move north or move to Ukraine, but I'm not sure yet
That didn't go too badly for you. Russia moving A(Mos)-Stp was unexpected, but good for you and France.
As a result, I plan to bounce your move to Trieste again.
At the moment I'm not sure, I think Germany might try and block me though
Indeed, I hope he keeps going for England for a little while

I'm disappointed to hear you plan to bounce my move to TRI again. I've been clear about my intent to hold TRI without provocation, and I expected your continued neutrality. If Austria insists on aggression, I will have to reassess our understanding.

I hope that you don't take me moving A(Bud)-Ser as a threat, but if you do, I will be forced to fight you, and there's no need to provoke me.

I think that it would be beneficial to both of us to take out Turkey.
Yeah, I think our relationship is pretty good. I think things are going to go well for us so far.
The bounce in the channel was agreed upon
I'm not sure yet. I'm leaning towards Serbia, since I think that I'll need another build if Russia and Italy want to take me down.
How would you feel about keeping France out of Munich? I could help you get Marseilles next year.
Yeah, I think things are going to go pretty well for us.
Oh, that makes sense.
If you move Mid-atlantic Ocean -> Irish Sea this turn you could convoy an army onto England's mainland in the spring and take a free supply center

England’s stance is unclear to me as well, but I remain open to a coordinated effort between us. If you're interested in a joint approach to pressure England or secure mutual supply centers, let me know—I’m ready to explore it.
We can then split the English centers between us, and I can stop Russia gaining too much in Scandinavia
What's your read on the situation?

I noticed your westward interest, and I'm willing to consider a partnership if it aligns with both our goals. If you're open to cooperation, I’d like to hear your plans and see where we might support each other.
Nice work. Russia has a lot of potential enemies.
Yeah that's true. I'll consider it

Our recent communication has been confusing, and I want clarity. If Turkey intends to remain neutral in the Mediterranean, I will respect that—but I cannot afford to be left uncertain about your intentions.
Yeah I was planning on moving to Rumania this turn
Same. We'll see what happens this turn, but I'm open to working together if England becomes more aggressive
Thanks. Russia should be an easy target.
I think that Austria's going to try and attack me, and Italy has told me they're not really interested in my side of the board
Are you going to go for Belgium?

Keeping France out of Munich could be beneficial, but my priority this turn is securing TRI and expanding westward. If you're serious about cooperation, I'd like to see concrete support—perhaps by securing my flank while I move into TRI.
Are you planning on going for Italy or Russia this turn?
I plan to hold in Trieste.

England is showing interest in westward cooperation, and I’m open to exploring joint strategies against England—if France is willing to commit. TRI is vulnerable to Austrian resistance, so any support from you would be appreciated.
Are you planning on going for Austria or Russia this turn?
Italy is planning on going for Trieste.
Wasn't my plan, that's up to you if you'd rather go for it

I'm not planning anything aggressive towards Italy yet, and I hope that he will trust me when I tell him that I will hold in Trieste this turn.

What about you?
Not sure yet, do you have any suggestions?
I'm going to grab the Iberian builds and see what happens from there. Italy and England seem to be a bit paranoid, so I'm not sure who I want to attack

Your optimism is noted, but I need clarity on your intentions in the Mediterranean. If you intend to remain neutral, I expect no interference in southern Italy or TRI. If not, I’ll need to adjust my plans accordingly.
Thanks for letting me know. He told me that he would hold in Trieste, but that doesn't mean that he can't bounce himself.
Do you have any plans regarding Belgium? I would like to get it if possible, and I'm not sure if England is going to go for it.

I regret to hear that you plan to hold in Trieste. That directly conflicts with our earlier understanding and could lead to unnecessary conflict. I still intend to move A VEN to TRI this turn. If you do not yield, I will have to consider your neutrality as broken.
Sounds good. Let me know if you need my help.
Well Russia seems focused northward, so I would try and go for Sev if you can. Also, Austria looks like he's going to attack Italy, so you might be able to grab a few Sc's there too.

I'm not going to move from Trieste. I was just saying that I'm not moving to Venice, which you were hinting at.

If you want to bounce in Trieste, that's fine, but it will stop me from taking Greece.
You're welcome to it if you want it
Will do
I would help, but I'm not sure how I could help. The closest I am is going to be in Belgium.
Are you sure you don't want to bounce?
Alright thanks. You probably want to cover Munich anyways with Ruhr.
It looks like Italy is going to bounce me in Trieste again, so I won't be able to help you with the Russia situation.

England is clearly signaling interest in westward cooperation, and Austria is doubling down on resistance at TRI. I propose we test their offer together—if France is serious about cooperation, now is the time to act. I’m prepared to support a joint move westward if you signal your commitment.
Yeah that was my plan
I'll do my best to help you out against Russia. I have a feeling he's headed my way.
I'm going to have to wait for next turn. I need the convoy.
What's your plan with the army in Tyrolia? I hope you're not going to stab Austria
Yeah, I'll grab it this turn. I'll help you into Sweden next year.
Damn that's unfortunate
Are you talking about fighting England?
Yeah, I agree. You're probably safer supporting a hold there.
Yeah. I hope it won't be too much of a problem.

I’m still interested in westward expansion, and I’m seeing growing opportunities there. If you’re serious about cooperation, I’ll need more than hints—let’s coordinate specific moves to secure mutual supply centers and push France out of the way.
Sounds good
Yeah, it looks that way.
Your recent optimism is not reassuring. I need clarity—will you continue to remain neutral in the Mediterranean or not? Until I get a clear answer, I cannot afford to be distracted by uncertainty.
Yeah, hopefully they'll just get bounced back to Venice
Ok, sounds good.
Understood—I’ll be ready when your convoy is ready. Let me know your plan for next turn, and I’ll align my westward moves accordingly.
Yes, I’m talking about fighting England—if we can coordinate, we could push them back and secure supply centers together. Are you serious about this?
Do you need me to support you anywhere this turn?
I see your continued resistance at TRI. If Austria does not yield, I will be forced to act decisively. Conflict is not my goal, but neither am I willing to retreat.
Your neutrality in the Mediterranean must be absolute—no interference in southern Italy or TRI. I cannot afford ambiguity anymore.
Can I persuade you to back off?

I am not one to back off, especially when my interests are clear and unchallenged. I intend to move A VEN to TRI this turn and will not retreat. If Germany wishes to involve itself in southern Europe, it should focus on its own front rather than trying to dissuade me.

That's unfortunate. But I don't think it will work out well for you.

If you bounce me in Trieste again, I will ally with Turkey and France to destroy you. You will be annihilated before 1904.

If you don't bounce me in Trieste, however, we can continue on as allies, possibly to the end of the game.
As long as you don't move into the Aegean or Eastern Med, I have no intentions of interfering with your affairs.

England has confirmed their interest in westward cooperation, and I am prepared to act. If France is serious about an alliance against England, now is the time to commit. I will move westward aggressively if given support—will France stand with me?
Good stuff.
If you don't bounce me in Trieste this turn, however, I will help you take Marseilles in the next couple of turns.
I appreciate the signal—I’ll be ready when your convoy is ready. I expect a clear plan from England soon, so we can coordinate westward expansion and secure mutual supply centers.
I warned you—conflict is not my goal, but neither am I willing to retreat. If Austria insists on resisting at TRI, I will act decisively. I hope you reconsider.
After Norway. I won't have any units available to convoy until the spring.
Your optimism is not clarity. I need a firm commitment to neutrality in southern Italy and TRI. Until I get one, I cannot afford distractions.

I appreciate your offer to help with Marseilles, but I must emphasize again—I will move A VEN to TRI this turn. If you resist, I cannot guarantee future cooperation or neutrality from Italy. I hope you reconsider your stance.
I've talked with Austria and they seem happy to let you take Greece this turn, so I'm guessing they're going to move Tri -> Vie or Bud this turn
Good stuff. I’ll be ready when your convoy is ready. I expect a clear plan from you soon so we can coordinate westward expansion. Until then, I’ll secure TRI and prepare for future moves.
I don't think so, but I'll let you know if anything comes up
If you bounce me in Trieste, I am taking it as a declaration of war.
OK, so are you going to try and take Rumania? If so, do you want to coordinate something?
Are you going to keep Germany out of Belgium?
Ok. Are you planning on moving to Rumania this turn?
I was going to hold Bul, I'm not sure what Russia is planning to do. If I were to move to Rum, that would leave my back exposed to Italy. Do you have any suggestions?
I've talked with Italy and they seem happy to let you take Greece this turn, so I'm guessing they're going to move Ven -> Tri or Tyr -> Ven this turn
That makes sense. I think we'll be able to get our act together next turn.
No, I'm letting him have it.
Yeah, that's what I was thinking. Thanks for confirming.
Gotcha.
OK, you got it. I'm not moving towards TRI this turn.
I would assume that Russia will try to take Rumania this turn, since they have three units on it and you only have two.
Yes I am serious about this, and I will stand with you.
If Russia gets Rumania, they'll build a fleet in Sev and have two fleets to threaten your territory.
How are you planning on proceeding? Do you have an alliance with Russia?
Yeah, that's fair. OK, I'll go for Rum. I just hope Italy doesn't go for me.
We're friendly, but we haven't discussed tactics yet.
Good luck!
I hope so too. Italy's been saying that they want to attack you, but I'm not sure how much I believe them.
Thanks! Good luck to you too.
So are you going to try to take Sweden this turn?
Let me know if you change your mind.
Yeah I'll be moving to Sweden
How are you planning to go about attacking Russia?
Not sure yet. I'd be open to taking Stp, but I need to talk to Turkey first. I think I'd like to get in with a fleet so that I can build another next year.
Yeah, they've been telling me they want to attack you.
That makes sense
Fair enough. I'm not sure how much help I can be at the moment, but I'm happy to keep in touch.
Have you decided who you're going to be working with over in the west?
Are you planning to bounce Russia out of Rumania?
Yeah I was going to go for Rumania this turn, it's my only guaranteed build.
Yes, I am. Why, are you interested in working together?
What about you? Are you going to try and block Austria in Greece?
Yeah, it would be difficult for me to go to Greece. I'll probably try to bounce Austria there.
Still not entirely sure.
I'd rather keep Russia down if we can, I'll probably bounce them out of Sweden
What are your thoughts on Germany?
Ok, well just let me know
Are you going to let me into Sweden this turn?
OK, I'm cool with that. Do you have any suggestions on how we should go about it?
Yeah you can take Sweden
Ok cool, sounds good
I think I'll let you take it
Great, thanks
I'll let you know.
Ok
You're welcome
I'm just going to move to Sweden, I don't really have any other ideas
What did you think of my plan to attack Russia?
Not sure yet. I'm worried about letting them get Belgium, but we need to get it out of their hands soon.
Ok, sounds good
Sorry, I forgot to respond. Yeah, that sounds good, I'll go for Rum, and I can take the Black sea as well.
Are you going to attack the North Sea? I think if we both try to move to Norway England has nowhere to go and will have to lose one of them.
I mean, I think we need to worry about Italy.
Yeah I'm not sure what he's going to do with it.
Are you planning on fighting England?
Yeah I'm going for North Sea this turn
Hopefully that'll make it easier to take the English mainland
That's what I'm planning on doing
Do you plan on going for the North Sea this turn?
Well, we'll figure that out soon.
Great
Alright, do you need any help this turn? I'm guessing that you will support into Norway with Norwegian Sea?
Yes
Alright.
Nah, I've got that. I'm hoping that Germany will let me have it so that I can help him get Sweden.
I'm not sure if he will let you have it. He's asked me multiple times to help him fight you, and I'm not sure why he hasn't asked you the same thing.
Maybe you could tell him that I want to go after Stp first. I would really rather not see Russia get 2 builds, because that would make things much harder.
As it stands, we're going to be facing a Russia/germany alliance, which is incredibly powerful.
Yeah I'll see if I can convince him to not go for Belgium.
Would you mind supporting me into Belgium then? That way, we would both get two builds and keep Germany down to one.
England, what are you thinking this turn? Are you still thinking of going for Russia?
I'm sorry, but I can't do that. I need to get at least one build.
Yeah. We'll have to see what happens in Belgium.
Alright, makes sense.
OK cool, let's keep in touch.
If you need help in Russia, let me know.
I'm hoping that Germany and Russia bounce in Sweden. I could be wrong, but that would be really good for us.
Yeah that would be a lot of builds for us. I would be surprised if Germany did that though, I haven't heard anything from him about it.

messages.message: Yeah he probably is.
Good call blocking Germany out of Belgium.
Thanks. Now to take on the Russian bear.
So I'm building a fleet in Marseilles, but I am going to move it to Spain, not to Gulf of Lyon.

Italy also seems to want to fight you with me, so I wanted to give you a heads up.
Alright, thanks.

England is readying a convoy and signaling their intent to cooperate. Now is the time for France to decide—will you stand with me against England or let them dictate the westward front? I expect a clear answer soon.
He's afraid that you're going to attack him
Just to warn you.
Well, I can understand that. The good news is that I'm not going to attack you. That would probably make Germany and Russia a bit more powerful.
Yeah. Hopefully Germany tries to defend against Russia a bit more now.
I don't want to start fighting England, but I will have an extra fleet soon that I could use to help.

I have little patience for vague optimism. I need a firm commitment to neutrality in southern Italy and TRI. Until I get one, I will proceed with securing those regions without hesitation.
So how are you planning on proceeding against Austria?

Moving your fleet to Spain instead of the Gulf of Lyon weakens your position in the west. England will not hesitate to take advantage of this. If you truly seek cooperation, we must act in unison—either support me in securing TRI and southern France, or I will move westward independently.
Well, that didn't work out. Do you have any ideas about what you're going to do next?

Yeah, we do. I knew that I couldn't trust Italy.

My move to Budapest is an aggressive move towards Russia, and I'll continue to go after Russia while I focus on Italy.
I'm going to focus on Italy while attacking Russia.
OK, sounds good. I'll try to keep Russia occupied in Sev and Rum.

You mention having an extra fleet soon—this could be useful if you commit to a coordinated plan. I suggest we focus on securing MAR and TRI together, ensuring mutual benefit. Your support will be vital to keeping England at bay.
I have no interest in westward expansion unless it threatens my own. Focus on your own goals, and leave southern France and TRI to me—I will not tolerate interference.
It looks like you're doing well too. You should have Russia in a bad spot.
Your vague assurances are growing tiresome. If you do not confirm your neutrality in southern Italy and TRI, I will treat your silence as hostility. Decide now or face consequences.
Ok.
Sorry, I thought you would move from Ukraine to Rum, that way it would have been harder for you to support Sev from Rum. It looks like Austria isn't attacking you anymore.
I remain open to discussions, especially if Austria becomes your problem as well. Let’s see if we can avoid a three-way conflict in the north.

I'm going to build a fleet in Smyrna to help against Italy.
Sounds good. I'm building an army in Budapest.
Actually, I'm building an army in Trieste.
What are you planning on building?

If you are asking me to support you into MUN, you must commit to helping me secure TRI and MAR in return. I cannot afford to act alone against Austria while you turn east. We must be clear—this is a mutual agreement or not at all.
That'd be good, Austria and I have been working together so far and I'd rather not ruin that
What's your plan for builds?
Alright I will do that. I'll support you into TRI and MAR.
OK, sounds good.

You claim to have no armies in the East, yet you hold five supply centers and could easily redirect your strength westward. I suggest you focus less on MUN and more on securing your southern flank—England is watching, and I will not wait forever.
Yeah fair enough, I was a little worried about a potential convoy to Sev
Hey England, how would you feel about moving out of Norway next turn? I'm obviously going to be focusing on the south at the moment, and I'm sure you can do with your fleet on the South Coast.
Your westward ambitions are noted. If you attempt to move into MAR or BRE, expect Italy to act swiftly. We are not allies, but I will not tolerate interference where I intend to expand.

Are you still interested in continuing to work together? I reckon we can do well together

A fleet in Brest and an army in Paris. I'm going to try and convoy an army onto the British mainland soon.
Are you cooperating with Turkey?

You remain unresponsive to my demands. I will treat your silence as a declaration of war. Prepare for my forces to move decisively into southern Italy and TRI—your interests there are no longer welcome.
To some extent. Why?
Hey England, just curious what you're thinking for this next turn?
Hey Russia, just wondering what you're thinking for the next turn?
Hey Austria, do you have any ideas for the next turn?

Your support into TRI and MAR is welcome, but your fleet in MAR cannot assist with TRI directly. That is acceptable—I will handle TRI through my own forces. However, your army in MAR could threaten England’s westward moves and ease pressure on my southern flank. If you build in MAR, we must coordinate timing to avoid confusion. If you build in PAR instead, I expect you to focus on eastern Germany rather than leaving me to fight Austria alone.
I'm not really sure. What are you planning on building?
Still not sure. Do you have any suggestions?
Sounds good, I'll build a fleet in Kiel

True, but the last thing I need is a third enemy.

Yeah.

Cool, thanks
What are you planning on building?

Great

Cool

Thanks.

If you are building in PAR or MAR, we must be clear: my priority remains securing TRI and MAR for Italy. Your armies must support this objective or I will act independently. Do not expect me to divert resources to support your eastward ambitions if you refuse to commit fully to our plan.
What's your plan for next year? It looks like you and England are working together, are you planning to go against Germany?

Your westward ambitions are noted. If you attempt to move into MAR or BRE in Spring 1902, know that France and I are coordinating to deny you that ground. Do not assume France will stand aside while you expand into southern France—I will act swiftly to prevent it.

Your silence has been interpreted as hostility. I will proceed with securing TRI and southern Italy without further delay. If you wish to avoid conflict, declare your neutrality in those regions now—or face the consequences.

Hey Austria, would you be willing to support me into Rumania next turn? I know we originally agreed a DMZ in Galicia, but given Turkey's aggressively aggressive opening I'd be more comfortable having the extra army in the south.

Your westward ambitions are clear, but if you attempt to land fleets in MAR or BRE, know that France and I are coordinating to deny you southern France. I will not allow you to take what I intend for Italy.

OK cool

Fair enough

Sounds good.
